arts.ttl: Official Manchester City bid for Omar Marmoush expected this weekend
arts.sum: An official bid from Manchester City for Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush is expected this weekend, according to Florian Plettenburg. The Egyptian international has been high on City’s wish list…

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Salford City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's FA Cup clash between Manchester City and Salford City.

arts.ttl: Man City 'fail' with opening bid for 18-year-old defender as Pep Guardiola suffers £33.5m blow
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly see their first offer for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis rejected by the Brazilian side, but they remain optimistic of striking an agreement.

arts.ttl: Liverpool could hijack ‘world-class’ Man City target; reliable journalist says Reds ‘looking’ at him
arts.sum: Liverpool’s need for a star holding midfielder evaporated in weeks after Ryan Gravenberch took to the field under Arne Slot. Despite the jury being firmly out on the Dutch international ahead of the 2024/25 campaign, the former Bayern Munich flop went on to secure a well-deserved starting berth in the first-XI. arts.ttl: Hidden Pep Guardiola comment exposes Man City squad divide that must be closed
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola let slip something he wasn't happy with last week - and will have been working hard to solve it ahead of the FA Cup clash with Salford.

arts.ttl: Manchester City make formal offer for player after striking contract agreement – He ‘welcomes the deal’
arts.sum: Manchester City have officially made their move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, with discussions on going about the potential transfer. That’s according to GE Globo, who report that Manchester City have made a proposal for the young defender, who ‘welcomes the deal’. arts.ttl: 'Not correct' - Palmeiras president breaks silence on Man City Vitor Reis interest with clear transfer terms
arts.sum: Manchester City are hoping to sign Vitor Reis from Palmeiras in January and the Brazilian side have responded to the interest.

arts.ttl: Frankfurt line up Rennes striker as replacement for Manchester City target Marmoush
arts.sum: Sky Sport Germany transfer specialist Florian Plettenberg has today reported that Eintracht Frankfurt are looking at Rennes forward Arnaud Kalimuendo (23) as a candidate to replace Omar Marmoush, should the Egyptian…

arts.ttl: Manchester City given encouragement in Marmoush chase and eye Khusanov
arts.sum: Frankfurt may consider €60m-plus bid for forward City also preparing £33m bid for Palmeiras’s Vítor Reis Manchester City are considering testing Eintracht Frankfurt’s resolve to keep highly-rated forward Omar Marmoush with a formal bid while also monitoring Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov and preparing an offer of €40m (£33m) for Palmeiras’s 18-year-old defender Vítor Reis. While Frankfurt’s official stance is that Marmoush is not for sale, it is understood the club, currently third in the Bundesliga, may countenance a €60m-plus (£50m-plus) offer for the 25-year-old Egyptian, who has scored 18 goals and provided 12 assists in all competitions this season. arts.ttl: Will Still confirms Abdukodir Khusanov’s impending move to Manchester City
